summary: Guides the human, organizational, and communication aspects of change to ensure improvements are adopted, sustained, and aligned with CI‑OS strategy.
responsibilities: Develop and execute change management strategies for CI‑OS initiatives, process updates, and system deployments
Assess organizational readiness and identify adoption risks or resistance points
Create communication plans, stakeholder maps, and engagement strategies
Facilitate cross-functional alignment and ensure all impacted roles understand upcoming changes
Collaborate with Training & Knowledge Manager to ensure learning materials reflect new processes
Monitor adoption metrics, feedback, and behavioral indicators to ensure sustained change
Support leaders in reinforcing continuous improvement culture and behaviors
Manage change impact assessments and ensure proper documentation
Coordinate pilot rollouts, phased deployments, and feedback loops
Ensure changes comply with governance, quality, and safety standards
authorities: Define change management requirements for major initiatives
Recommend go/no-go decisions for change rollouts
cqiCapabilities: Integration of change management into CQI project cycles

constraints: All changes must align with governance and quality standards
Communication must be consistent with approved messaging
Adoption risks must be documented and escalated
